app.name: Dr. Kimia Habibi
app.description: A focused clinic for pain relief, recovery, and return to movement

hero.title: Reduce pain and restore movement
hero.subtitle: At Dr. Kimia Habibi's clinic, treatment plans are built from a careful exam, your history, and a realistic recovery goal so the journey stays clear and measurable.

cta.title: Need a clear and trustworthy path to start treatment?
cta.subtitle: You can book directly on this site, review services, and contact the clinic without friction.

services.title: Specialized Services
services.subtitle: A practical set of treatments for musculoskeletal pain, sports injuries, and rehabilitation.

web_development.title: Physiotherapy & Manual Therapy
web_development.description: Reduce pain, improve movement patterns, and support functional recovery with tailored protocols.

mobile_app.title: Shockwave & High-Power Laser
mobile_app.description: Adjunct device-based treatments that help reduce pain and accelerate healing.

ai.title: Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation
ai.description: Detailed assessment, recovery planning, and step-by-step follow-up to return to daily life.

design.title: Exercise Therapy
design.description: Purposeful exercises that build stability, strength, and resilience against relapse.

cloud.title: EMG & Nerve Function Review
cloud.description: Clinical review of nerve involvement to guide the next treatment decision.

security.title: Acupuncture & Dry Needling
security.description: A helpful option for reducing spasm and muscle pain alongside the main treatment.

performance.title: Special Injections & PRP
performance.description: Adjunct treatment options for selected cases under direct physician supervision.

cta.title: Need guidance choosing the right treatment?
cta.subtitle: Book a visit or call the clinic and we will recommend the best option based on your condition.

portfolio.title: Treatment Path
portfolio.subtitle: A snapshot of the clinic's treatment approach and follow-up metrics.

team.title: Care Team
team.subtitle: People who keep the clinic organized, responsive, and calm.

about.title: About the Doctor
about.description: Dr. Kimia Habibi Siyahpoosh focuses on physiotherapy, physical medicine, and rehabilitation with a precise, patient-first approach to pain relief and functional recovery.

contact.title: Book & Contact
contact.subtitle: Use this form to request an appointment, ask about services, or coordinate with the clinic.
